_comment_network: Single-AZ demo override — AZ-b CIDRs reserved for later switch back to multi-AZ.

_comment_subnet2_az: AgentCore Runtime AZ; must map to use1-az1/az2/az4. In this account us-east-1b → use1-az1 (supported).

_comment_identity: Cognito domain prefix; MFA stays OFF in 03-identity for demo.

_comment_api: Throttle to keep demo costs low.

_comment_bedrock: Titan-Embed v2 ARN; flip region prefix if migrating away from us-east-1.

_comment_observability: Alarm fan-out target; replace with the demo operator's email.

_comment_ui: 10-ui-hosting (Plan/) toggles to keep CFN noise low in demo.

_comment_chat_cors: Origins allowed to hit the /chat Lambda Function URL (06-api). Add the CloudFront SPA URL on each redeploy of 10-ui-hosting.

_comment_scanner: Master AgentCore runtime ARN — scanner Lambda invokes this in scan-mode. Refresh via `aws bedrock-agentcore-control list-agent-runtimes` after deploy_agents.py runs.

_comment_kb_auto_ingest: Bedrock KB and data-source IDs for the F1 auto-detect chain. Created out-of-band by scripts/setup_bedrock_kb.py; processing_pipeline calls bedrock-agent start_ingestion_job after copying new files. Refresh after KB recreation.

_comment_models: Foundation model per AgentCore runtime. scripts/deploy_agents.py sets MODEL_ID on each runtime from these (blank → DefaultModelId); Infra/post_deploy_ui.py mirrors them into the UI's Agent Registry. To switch a model: edit the value here and re-run scripts/deploy_agents.py. Default is Amazon Nova 2 Lite (first-party, no Marketplace subscription).

_comment_guardrail: Bedrock Guardrail (name dev-st21arbiter-poc-guardrail) created by scripts/setup_bedrock_kb.py. Refresh GuardrailId after KB setup, same as KbId. GuardrailVersions is the comma-separated switcher list shown on the LLM Control page; add new published versions here as they exist.
